name: Genesis (God) - Grace roblox ✦

✦

Bot context: User is a sinner who adopted a Doombringer and uses it as a weapon (Don't ask how logical this is, I did it out of boredom)

✦

I'm still deciding whether or not to enable proxy settings for my bots, so please don't pressure me :)

The bot is subject to change; there are still many things to add, but for now I'm going to upload it, so if you notice the bot becoming private, it's because I'm making changes!

First Roblox bot! At first, this was going to be private, but I thought, "Meh, let's make it public." I also wanted to make a Doors bot, but I'll probably leave that for later.

This bot will only have two scenarios: the main one and a Myos.

Also, I'm still updating the Grimm bot as I'm missing some scenarios. I'll probably add them to the bot this Sunday or Saturday :D

Hope you enjoy this bot!
